outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low short-term volatility suppressed by positive GEX; high risk of sharp directional moves if support breaks.
outlook.summary: Spot is trapped between the 670 and 675 strikes. While extremely high Put/Call Ratios and a bearish volatility skew indicate significant downside hedging, positive Total GEX in the 0DTE and Weekly expiries is actively suppressing volatility. The market is likely to remain range-bound near the 675 resistance unless support at 670 fails, which would trigger negative gamma exposure.

levels.motivazione: Immediate resistance just above spot with massive 0DTE volume (376k) and high WEEKLY Call OI. Dealers will defend this level aggressively to cap intraday upside.
High-frequency pinning level very close to spot, driven by massive conflicting MONTHLY Call and Put open interest. Acts as an intraday fulcrum.
First major structural support below the friction zone. It is backed by heavy 0DTE Call OI and significant MONTHLY Put OI, providing a strong initial floor.
Secondary resistance ceiling with substantial open interest across WEEKLY and MONTHLY expirations, reinforcing the broad 675-680 resistance zone.
Monthly Max Pain level acting as a structural price magnet. The extremely high Monthly PCR (3.93) suggests an upward gravitational pull is actively fighting the bearish skew.
Major structural confluence support marked by massive WEEKLY Put OI (34k) and MONTHLY Put OI (27k). A breach here would trigger dealer hedging flows.
Ultimate institutional downside buffer with extreme MONTHLY Put OI (69k). Negative Monthly GEX means a test of this level would cause severe volatility amplification.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Stable. Positive total GEX across all expiries (~3.83B) suppresses volatility and supports prices.
outlook.summary: Market shows a strong bullish structure underpinned by a massively positive cumulative GEX. Reverse smirk skews in WEEKLY and MONTHLY expiries confirm upward momentum. Spot is trading near the 25000 RESONANCE level, which acts as a primary pinning point. Absolute structural support is defined by the 24000 RESONANCE Put Wall and Max Pain convergence.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Major Call and Put intersection in 0DTE with massive Call volume (2168). Significant Call OI in WEEKLY (134) and MONTHLY (72). Acts as the primary pinning point and immediate resistance.
levels.sintesiOperativa: SELL AREA: Massive Call Wall resistance

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Major Put Wall across all expiries (0DTE 68, WEEKLY 50, MONTHLY 533). Coincides exactly with 0DTE and MONTHLY Max Pain. Ultimate structural support floor.
CONFLUENCE: High Call OI in WEEKLY (345) and 0DTE (90). Acts as a local resistance and friction zone just below the spot price.
levels.sintesiOperativa: SELL AREA: Call friction zone active

levels.motivazione: CONFLUENCE: Put support in WEEKLY (Vol/OI > 1.5 indicating unusual activity) against heavy Call OI in MONTHLY (326). Creates a structural price magnet.
WALL: Massive Call OI in MONTHLY (4028). Deep ITM call wall acts as a structural ceiling for the monthly timeframe and supports the uptrend.
WALL: Highest OI in 0DTE (238) with massive volume (661). Upper boundary resistance for the current daily session.

levels.motivazione: MAGNET: WEEKLY Max Pain level aligned with massive Call OI (548) and extreme unusual volume (539). Strong market maker target.
